summary: Comprehensive testing of CarryOn™ 30-day free trial with subscription paywall feature. All 25 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend tests PASSED - billing toggle, plan display, admin controls, trial banner all working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns 200 with all 6 subscription tiers
Plan pricing correct: Premium $9.99, Standard $8.99, Base $7.99, New Adult $3.99, Military $5.99, Hospice $0.00
Quarterly pricing (10% off) and Annual pricing (20% off) calculated correctly
Beneficiary plans returned with correct pricing
beta_mode and family_plan_enabled flags returned in plans API
GET /api/subscriptions/status requires authentication
Status returns trial info (trial_active, days_remaining, trial_ends_at)
Status returns beta_mode flag and subscription details
Status returns user_role for subscription gating
POST /api/verification/upload requires authentication
Verification upload rejects invalid tier (military/hospice only)
Verification upload accepts military tier with base64 document
GET /api/verification/status returns user's verification status
GET /api/admin/verifications requires admin role (returns 403 for non-admin)
Admin can list all verification requests
POST /api/admin/verifications/{id}/review requires admin role
Review endpoint rejects invalid action (must be approve/deny)
GET /api/admin/subscription-stats requires admin role
Admin stats returns total_users, active_trials, active_subscriptions, pending_verifications
GET /api/admin/subscription-settings requires admin role
Admin settings returns beta_mode, plans array, and stats
Signup page has date_of_birth field with data-testid='signup-dob-input'
DOB field shows helper text about age-based plan eligibility (New Adult tier)
Settings page displays all 6 subscription tiers with correct pricing
Billing toggle switches between monthly/quarterly/annual pricing correctly
Admin Verifications tab shows pending verification requests with Approve/Deny buttons
Admin Subscriptions tab shows beta mode toggle, family plan toggle, and plan pricing
Beta mode toggle successfully turns subscriptions required ON/OFF
Trial banner shows '29 days left in your free trial' when beta mode OFF and trial active
Trial banner shows 'Choose Plan' button for upgrade flow
Paywall does NOT show for admin users (admin exempt)
Paywall does NOT show when beta mode is ON (all features free)
Family Plan section visible in admin subscriptions with pricing info
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 subscription tiers correctly implemented in DEFAULT_PLANS with proper pricing
BENEFICIARY_PLANS array properly structured with 4 beneficiary plan options
calculate_trial_status() correctly handles timezone-aware datetime comparisons
ProtectedRoute in App.js correctly checks subscriptionStatus?.needs_subscription and user role
SubscriptionPaywall component properly filters plans based on eligible_tiers
TrialBanner component shows when trial active, beta OFF, and no subscription
Admin panel SubscriptionsAdmin includes beta mode toggle, family plan toggle, and plan pricing management
VerificationsAdmin shows pending verifications with Approve/Deny actions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All subscription features working correctly. Beta mode is currently ON (all features free). 6 subscription tiers: Premium $9.99, Standard $8.99, Base $7.99, New Adult $3.99 (ages 18-25), Military $5.99 (requires verification), Hospice $0 (requires verification). Military verification pending for founder@carryon.us user. Trial banner shows when beta OFF and trial active. Paywall blocks access when beta OFF and trial expired (no active subscription). Admin users are exempt from paywall.

signup_dob_field.helper_text: Used to determine age-based plan eligibility (New Adult tier)

paywall_gating.blocks_when_needed: beta OFF + trial expired + no subscription
